add_key.label: Add Key
add_key.notes: Identify the fitted immobiliser and dashboard before programming.

all_keys_lost.label: All Keys Lost
all_keys_lost.notes: May require cluster data, bench access or current security access. No universal OBD claim.

remote_learning.label: Remote Learning
remote_learning.notes: Remote matching may be separate from transponder learning on earlier vehicles.

key_identification.label: Key and Transponder Identification
key_identification.notes: Confirm blade, frequency, button layout and keyed/KESSY specification from the original key or VIN-supported data.
